seed_policy: Use a documented seeded run; do not record private state.

tasks.prompt: Start, draft two actions, validate, submit, review resolution, and describe what refreshed.
tasks.success_observation: Participant completes the host handoff without facilitator teaching the intended answer.

tasks.prompt: Identify Riverside, Northlake, and Summit and explain how each is labeled.
tasks.success_observation: Participant identifies each from visible labels/tokens without hidden information.

tasks.prompt: Identify one facility, project/capacity signal, pressure signal, public rival observation, and source/status label.
tasks.success_observation: Participant points to visible entities and their source/status or missingness text.

tasks.prompt: Trace one drafted action through validation, submission, resolution, and a visible consequence.
tasks.success_observation: Participant distinguishes committed effects from uncertain or future responses.

tasks.prompt: Use the resolution stages, history, and replay context to reconstruct the first month.
tasks.success_observation: Participant describes the written sequence without inventing hidden state.

tasks.prompt: Repeat recognition and tracing with keyboard navigation, larger text, reduced motion, and skip/review.
tasks.success_observation: Participant can reach and review equivalent written content.

tasks.prompt: Try full audio, cues-only, mute, reduced notifications, unavailable audio, and written equivalents.
tasks.success_observation: Participant reports usefulness, fatigue, and any lost meaning without sound.

rating_scale: 1=very poor or confusing; 5=very clear or useful; not-observed is allowed.
evidence_limits: No participant results are included in this preparation artifact.
Preparation does not establish legal clearance, universal accessibility, clinical validity, policy forecasting accuracy, or educational effectiveness.
Human evaluation and any go/no-go decision remain separate authorization gates.
